systems.name: OpenCode Session Runtime
systems.description: Session tool execution and synced TUI rendering runtime.

containers.name: Tool Execution Backend
containers.description: Server-side tool execution pipeline and metadata publication.

containers.name: Session TUI
containers.description: Solid Ink-style session route rendering tool-part state for operators.

components.name: ApplyPatchTool
components.description: Parses patches, applies file changes, runs diagnostics, and emits phased metadata.

components.name: Tool Runtime Metadata Bridge
components.description: Propagates tool-part state metadata from backend execution into synced session message parts.

components.name: ApplyPatch Renderer
components.description: Renders expandable running/completed apply_patch cards in the session TUI.

components.name: ToolPart Metadata Adapter
components.description: Maps part state into tool props so running-state metadata becomes available to renderers.

components.name: Validation Surface
components.description: Manual operator checks and regression verification for observability states.

relationships.description: Exposes running-state metadata to tool render props
Provides metadata input for ApplyPatch rendering
Presents observable execution state for manual validation
